description_long: This handbag features a boxy, rectangular shape with a structured silhouette and a glossy, semi-reflective surface. The front and back panels display a colorful, abstract pattern with hues of blue, orange, and pink, giving it a modern and artistic appearance. The sides are narrow and dark, likely made of a synthetic or leather-like material, providing contrast to the vibrant panels. The top edge appears to have a zipper closure, and there are no visible external pockets or compartments. The bag is equipped with a single, short handle, suggesting it is designed to be carried by hand or on the forearm. No visible brand logo or decorative hardware is present, emphasizing a clean and contemporary design.
description: A boxy, structured handbag with a colorful abstract pattern on the front and back, dark sides, and a short handle. The surface is glossy and modern, with a zipper closure on top.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the slim, dark edge of the handbag with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the vibrant, abstract pattern and the structured, rectangular shape of the bag.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side, similar to view 0, with a dark, slim profile and little visible detail.
description_view_3: The back view, nearly identical to the front, displays the same colorful abstract pattern and boxy form.
attribute_strap_type: single short handle, non-adjustable, attached at the top ends of the bag
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure located along the top edge
